Senior ML Engineer

Boston, MA / Remote Full-time Applied AI

About Helio Labs

Helio Labs builds machine learning systems for energy forecasting and grid reliability. Our models help customers understand demand, detect anomalies, and plan resilient infrastructure across changing conditions.

As a Senior ML Engineer, you will productionize Python services, design feature pipelines, collaborate with product teams, and ship APIs that make model outputs useful to operators. We work with TypeScript frontends, PostgreSQL, Redis, Docker, Kubernetes, AWS, and GitHub Actions.

  • Experience with Python, model serving, REST APIs, and distributed data processing is required.
  • Strong communication skills and production ownership are important for this full-time role.
  • Bonus points for GraphQL, geospatial data, and time-series forecasting experience.
Applied AI Engineer
 New York, NY Full-time
Data Platform Engineer
 Remote Contract
